exercises.name: Chords
exercises.userMessage: Hear the chord and choose your answer

children.name: Major chords
children.description: Practice recognizing major chord qualities by ear.

children.name: Minor chords
children.description: Practice recognizing minor chord qualities by ear.

children.name: Diminished chords
children.description: Practice recognizing tense diminished chord sounds by ear.

children.name: Augmented chords
children.description: Practice recognizing bright augmented chord sounds by ear.

children.name: Suspended chords
children.description: Practice distinguishing suspended chord sounds from major and minor harmony.

children.name: Chords with a minor seven
children.description: Practice recognizing chords that include a minor seventh by ear.

children.name: Chords with a major seven
children.description: Practice recognizing chords that include a major seventh by ear.

children.name: Chords with inversions
children.description: Practice identifying chord qualities when notes are rearranged in inversion.

children.name: Lots of chords
children.description: Practice recognizing a broad mix of common chord qualities by ear.
